nodes.name: São Tomé olive pigeon
nodes.summary: São Tomé olive pigeon（São Tomé olive pigeon，学名 Columba thomensis），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: Água Izé
nodes.summary: Água Izé is a village on São Tomé Island.

nodes.name: Xufexufe
nodes.summary: Rio Xufexufe is a river in the island of São Tomé, São Tomé and Príncipe.

nodes.name: Bombaim
nodes.summary: Bombaim is a small village on São Tomé Island in São Tomé and Príncipe.

nodes.name: São João dos Angolares
nodes.summary: São João dos Angolares是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括São Tomé olive pigeon，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The olive pigeon occurs in several parts of the island of São Tomé, including the northwest (Chamiço), the central massif (Lagoa Amelia, Zampalma, Nova Ceilão, Bombaim and the valley of Rio Io Grande near Formoso Pequeno), the southwest (valleys of the rivers Xufexufe and Ana Chaves) and in the southeast (west of Água Izé, on Pico Maria Fernandes and north of São João dos Angolares)
